series_metadata.series_description: Includes records related to the operations of the DHS-approved Secure Rooms (SR) and Secure briefing space at the STACC and SAIC, including attendance and access rights for such rooms. Records include, but not limited to: passwords (e.g. SF 700) and PINs; security checks (e.g., SF 701, 702); secure equipment and inventory documents; attendance records and logs; security-related training s; SF 312 debriefing/inactivation.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in OHS network drive current, plus two (2) years. ; Paper: Retain in office files current, plus two (2) years, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
